ui.title: Dashboards
ui.subtitle: Compose visualizations and narrative into a single layout.

messages.noDashboardsDescription: Create your first dashboard or browse standalone visualizations.
messages.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? Visualizations referenced by this dashboard are not affected.
messages.emptyDashboardEditorHint: Pick a widget from the toolbar to get started.

widgetTypes.visualizationDescription: Embed an existing chart by reference
widgetTypes.tableDescription: Show paginated rows from an experiment table
widgetTypes.filterDescription: Let viewers narrow the data shown across widgets

inspector.title: Widget settings
inspector.noSelection: Select a widget to edit its settings.

visualizationConfig.pickHint: Use the inspector on the right to choose a chart.
visualizationConfig.noneAvailable: No visualizations yet for this experiment.

filterConfig.configureHint: Use the inspector to pick a table, column, and operator.
filterConfig.defaultValueHint: Sets the dashboard's default value. Viewers can override per session.
filterConfig.scopeHint: Filters apply to every visualization on this dashboard that reads from the same table.

tableConfig.pickHint: Use the inspector on the right to choose a table.
tableConfig.noneAvailable: No tables available for this experiment.
tableConfig.filtersHint: AND-merged with any dashboard-level filter widgets that target the same table.

widget.missingVisualizationDescription: The chart this widget points to may have been deleted.
widget.emptyVisualizationDescription: This widget hasn't been wired up to a chart yet.
widget.emptyRichTextDescription: This text widget has no content yet.
widget.emptyTableDescription: This widget hasn't been wired up to a data table yet.
widget.emptyFilterDescription: Open the inspector to pick a column and operator.
widget.emptyDashboardDescription: No widgets have been added yet.
widget.expandedPreviewDescription: Full-size preview of the widget content.
widget.tableLoadFailedDescription: The table this widget points to may have been removed or is unavailable.

overview.title: Dashboards
overview.emptyDescription: Compose visualizations and narrative into a layout, or jump straight to standalone charts.
